query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A woman with brown hair pulled back, wearing a black tank top, is shown in profile against a plain white background. She extends her right arm to hold a purple-labeled Vitaminwater bottle from which a stream of pinkish-purple liquid arcs through the air toward her face. The photograph freezes the motion of the liquid in midair, showing individual droplets as the stream makes contact near her eye. Her mouth is open and her eyes are closed.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman in a black tank top is shown in profile against a plain white background, extending her right arm to hold a purple-labeled Vitaminwater bottle as a stream of pinkish-purple liquid arcs toward her face. The image displays strong negative personal emotion: her mouth is wide open in a distressed expression and her eyes are squeezed shut as the liquid splashes against her eye, conveying a sense of pain, shock, and discomfort. The high-speed studio photograph freezes the chaotic arc and suspended droplets of the beverage in midair.
